few_shot_new.generated_code:
def transform_data(src, sys):
    result = {}
    result['g_channel'] = src['CHANNEL']
    result['m_gid'] = f"=codex::base64Decode({src['ARTICLEID']})"
    result['m_root_gid'] = f"=codex::base64Decode({src['PARTICLEID']})"
    result['m_publish_time'] = f"=time::parseDate(\"yyyyMMddHHmmss\",{src['PUBLISHTIME']})"
    result['m_snapshot_time'] = f"=time::parseDate(\"yyyyMMddHHmmss\",{src['SNAPSHOTTIME']})"
    result['m_read_count'] = src['PVNUM']
    result['m_comment_count'] = src['REPLYNUM']
    result['m_share_count'] = src['SHARENUM']
    result['m_collect_count'] = src['INSTRESTNUM']
    result['m_report_count'] = src['REPORTNUM']
    result['m_support_count'] = src['SUPPORTNUM']
    result['m_oppose_count'] = src['OPPOSENUM']
    result['m_year'] = f"=time::getElements(time::parseDate(\"yyyyMMddHHmmss\",{src['PUBLISHTIME']}))[year]"
    result['m_month'] = f"=time::getElements(time::parseDate(\"yyyyMMddHHmmss\",{src['PUBLISHTIME']}))[month]"
    result['m_day'] = f"=time::getElements(time::parseDate(\"yyyyMMddHHmmss\",{src['PUBLISHTIME']}))[day]"
    result['m_hour'] = f"=time::getElements(time::parseDate(\"yyyyMMddHHmmss\",{src['PUBLISHTIME']}))[hour]"
    result['g_asp'] = f"=util::mapping({sys['key_map']},{src['DOMAIN']})"
    if 'SHAREINFO' in src and src['SHAREINFO']:
        result['ma_share_info'] = []
        for share_item in src['SHAREINFO']:
            platform = share_item.get('platform', '')
            count = share_item.get('count', 0)
            result['ma_share_info'].append({
                'platform': platform,
                'count': count
            })
    return result
